rationale: Cites real authors (Beck 2001, Cohn 2009) but misattributes a precise '30%' effect size to Beck and silently redefines 'agile' across paragraphs to manufacture contradictory conclusions, paraphrasing well beyond what the cited sources claim.
rubric_evidence: When agile means daily stand-ups and short sprints
if we define agile as continuous customer involvement
agile is both the best and worst methodology
